title: Healthcare Provider Dashboard
description: Designed an analytics dashboard for healthcare providers managing patient populations across multiple clinics. The dashboard surfaces critical metrics — appointment no-show rates, patient satisfaction scores, and care gap alerts — in a scannable format that respects the cognitive load of busy clinicians. The project required close collaboration with medical staff to understand their workflow, compliance with HIPAA display requirements, and careful attention to data visualization accessibility. Color choices were validated for deuteranopia and protanopia, and all charts include text alternatives.
shortDescription: Analytics dashboard helping clinicians manage patient populations effectively
